mapper.insert: INSERT INTO room_participants (room_id, black_user_id, black_token) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{blackUserId}, #{blackToken})

INSERT INTO room_participants (room_id, black_user_id, black_token, observer_user_id, observer_token, puzzle_room) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{blackUserId}, #{blackToken}, #{observerUserId}, #{observerToken}, 1)
mapper.update: UPDATE room_participants SET white_user_id = #{whiteUserId}, white_token = #{whiteToken}, white_is_bot = 0, bot_search_depth_min = NULL, bot_search_depth_max = NULL, bot_ai_style = NULL WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND white_user_id IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT room_id, black_user_id, black_token, white_user_id, white_token, white_is_bot, bot_search_depth_min, bot_search_depth_max, bot_ai_style, observer_user_id, observer_token, puzzle_room FROM room_participants WHERE room_id = #{roomId} LIMIT 1
